description: Create a rectangular polygon grid (fishnet) covering the study area defined by the layer at /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson (approximate extent: -122.5 to -121.9 longitude, 37.5 to 37.8 latitude). Use a horizontal and vertical spacing of 0.1 degrees and set the grid CRS to EPSG:4326 (WGS 84). Export the resulting grid layer to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/study_area_grid.geojson.
